StartAndWaitForATextSuggestionApproval.displayName: Start and wait for an approval of text

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Create a title of the approval

parameters.name: Suggested text
parameters.description: Specify suggested text to approve or modify

parameters.name: Details
parameters.description: Markdown syntax is supported (see https://aka.ms/approvaldetails)

parameters.name: Item Link
parameters.description: Add a link to the item to approve.

parameters.name: Item Link Description
parameters.description: Describe the link to the item

parameters.name: Assigned To
parameters.description: Email addresses, separated by a semicolon (;)

parameters.name: Requestor
parameters.description: Add the email of the person generating this request

parameters.name: Enable notifications
parameters.description: Enable email, push, and Teams notifications

parameters.name: Enable reassignment
parameters.description: Enable reassignment of approval requests

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Attachment name

parameters.name: Content
parameters.description: Attachment content

parameters.name: PartnerMetadata
parameters.description: The metadata required for the partner integration through which the approval was created.

parameters.name: Partner ID
parameters.description: The Id required for partner integration through which the approval was created.

approvalSubscribe.displayName: Start and wait for an Approve or Reject - First to respond approval [DEPRECATED]

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Specify the title of the approval.

parameters.name: Details
parameters.description: Specify the details of the approval request. Markdown syntax is supported, see https://aka.ms/approvaldetails for more information.

parameters.name: Item Link
parameters.description: Specify a link to the item to approve.

parameters.name: Item Link Description
parameters.description: Specify a description for the item to approve.

parameters.name: Assigned To
parameters.description: Specify to whom the approval should be assigned. This should be a semi-colon (;) delimited collection of either email addresses, UPNs, or Microsoft Entra ID user ids.
